basics.name: Ziyi Yang (杨子毅)
basics.label: Ph.D. Candidate in Organic Chemistry
basics.summary: Ph.D. candidate at Tsinghua University working at the intersection of computational protein design, generative models, and chemical protein synthesis.

work.company: Yanyan Lan Lab, Institute for AI Industry Research (AIR), Tsinghua University
work.summary: Protein design with synthetic data and generative models.

work.company: Jishen Zheng Lab, University of Science and Technology of China
work.summary: Directed evolution of split inteins via phage display.
Mirror-image peptide binder design via the RIF pipeline.

publications.name: Design Cyclic Peptide Binders
publications.summary: Large-scale cyclic-peptide-receptor structure data for model scaling in cyclic peptide binder design.

publications.name: CPSea2: Cyclic-Compatible Structure Data for Cyclic Peptide Binder Design
publications.summary: Cyclic-compatible peptide-receptor structure data built with terminal amide pose screening.

publications.name: Cross-Chirality Generalization by Axial Vectors for Hetero-Chiral Protein-Peptide Interaction Design
publications.summary: Chirality-aware generative modeling for hetero-chiral protein-peptide interaction design.

publications.name: Assist Protein Folding by Glycosylation
publications.summary: Glycosylation prevents aggregation during folding and expands access to chemically synthesized proteins.
